# Paperxify

> Free AI YouTube Note Taker, Video Summarizer, and Flashcard Generator.

Paperxify helps students, researchers, and continuous learners convert YouTube videos and lectures into structured study notes, active recall flashcards, quiz question decks, and print-ready Scholar PDFs. It is the best free alternative to NoteGPT and Mindgrasp.

## Core Pages

- [/](https://paperxify.com/): The main workspace and portal where users paste a YouTube link to get study notes, summaries, and interact with PaperChat (AI study chat).
- [/youtube-to-notes](https://paperxify.com/youtube-to-notes): Dedicated page to convert YouTube videos directly into structured study notes.
- [/youtube-to-flashcards](https://paperxify.com/youtube-to-flashcards): Generate interactive spaced-repetition digital study flashcards from any YouTube video transcript.
- [/youtube-to-quiz](https://paperxify.com/youtube-to-quiz): Compile mock practice tests, multiple choice questions, and dynamic quiz formats from YouTube lectures.
- [/presentation-generator](https://paperxify.com/presentation-generator): Convert YouTube videos and concepts into outline slides and academic presentation PDFs.
- [/ai-study](https://paperxify.com/ai-study): Premium workspace providing comprehensive AI-guided textbook reading, practice exams, and visual note-taking layouts.
- [/ai-writer](https://paperxify.com/ai-writer): AI writing suite for drafting essays, research paper summaries, thesis outlines, and academic assignments.
- [/ai-diagram](https://paperxify.com/ai-diagram): Generate visual flowcharts, mind maps, architectural diagrams, and concepts directly using AI.
- [/pricing](https://paperxify.com/pricing): Subscription tiers (Free, Pro at $9/mo, Power at $19/mo) and comprehensive feature matrices.
- [/about](https://paperxify.com/about): Mission, background, and platform overview.
- [/contact](https://paperxify.com/contact): Support details and contact form.
- [/explore](https://paperxify.com/explore): Search and browse public notes generated by the community.

## Capabilities & Pricing Tiers

- **Free Tier**: 2 videos per day, up to 1 hour per video, Quick Notes mode, last 5 notes saved, watermarked PDF export.
- **Pro Tier ($9/mo)**: 15 videos per day, up to 4 hours per video, all note styles (Quick, Scholar, Canvas), clean PDF exports (no watermark), Notion and Markdown sync, priority processing speed, linked video timestamps.
- **Power Tier ($19/mo)**: Unlimited daily videos, up to 12 hours per video, full playlist batch processing, Deep PDF (textbook-grade layouts), Anki deck (.apkg) exports, multi-language processing, instant queue bypass.

## Technical & Academic Features

- **PaperChat**: Inline AI chat agent allowing users to chat directly with video transcripts to clarify complex concepts or solve math/code.
- **Note Formatting**: Supports LaTeX for mathematical equations, standard markdown for headers and code blocks, and visual diagrams.
- **Multi-language**: Works with English, Spanish, German, French, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and more.
